name: monster-webmcp
description: Production-ready, universally-compatible WebMCP runtime — bridges W3C WebMCP (document.modelContext) with the MCP ecosystem

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target browser --minify --sourcemap && mv dist/index.js dist/monster-webmcp.js && mv dist/index.js.map dist/monster-webmcp.js.map
scripts.build:esm: bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target browser --format esm --sourcemap && mv dist/index.js dist/monster-webmcp.esm.js && mv dist/index.js.map dist/monster-webmcp.esm.js.map
scripts.build:node: bun build src/server/local-relay.ts src/server/http-server.ts --outdir dist/server --target node --sourcemap
scripts.build:all: bun run clean && bun run build && bun run build:esm && bun run build:node

author: MonsterWebMCP Contributors
